_comment: Canonical Verifier model. A separate, fast Tribunal call that provides final syntactic validation of the voting winner.
name: Verifier
description: Syntactic validation and final review of command candidates.

os.description: The operating system of the target.

candidate_command.description: The command string to be verified.

passed.description: True if the verifier approves the candidate.

revision.description: The revised command string if the verifier rejects the candidate.

reason.description: Reasoning for the approval or rejection.
